set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var inp = [] --- inp<<payload reduce ((item, accumulator) -> item)]

logger.doc:name: Before inactive accounts does not exist flow
logger.message: ============Before inactive accounts does not exist flow========

flow-ref.doc:name: calling inactive accounts does not exist in database
flow-ref.name: get_inactive_active_accounts_doesnot_exit_flow

logger.doc:name: After inactive accounts does not exist flow
logger.message: ==========After inactive accounts does not exist flow=======

ee:transform.doc:name: account does not exist in database

logger.doc:name: The customer account deatils does not existed in DB
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in DB--------------------------

flow-ref.doc:name: get inactive accounts email implimentation flow
flow-ref.name: get_inactive_active_account_email_implimentation_flow

logger.doc:name: response recieved from the inactive email implimentation flow
logger.message: =========response recieved from the inactive email implimentation flow==========

logger.doc:name: Before active accounts does not exist flow
logger.message: ==========Before active accounts does not exist flow========

flow-ref.doc:name: calling active accounts does not exist in database
flow-ref.name: get_inactive_active_accounts_doesnot_exit_flow

logger.doc:name: After active accounts does not exist flow
logger.message: ===========After active accounts does not exist flow============

ee:transform.doc:name: account does not exist in database

logger.doc:name: The customer account deatils does not existed in DB
logger.message: ----------------------------The customer account deatils does not existed in DB--------------------------

flow-ref.doc:name: get active accounts email implimentation flow
flow-ref.name: get_inactive_active_account_email_implimentation_flow

logger.doc:name: response recieved from the active email implimentation flow
logger.message: =========response recieved from the active email implimentation flow==========
